query:
SELECT e.id, e.name, e.address, e.neighborhood, c.name as category, e.rating
FROM establishments e
JOIN categories c ON e.categoryId = c.id
WHERE e.id IN (4674, 5083, 5579)
ORDER BY e.id;
command:
